scenarios.description: Flash Fire boosts Fire-type moves by 1.5x when activated
scenarios.note: Flash Fire: 1.5x boost to Fire moves when triggered. Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c FlashFireCheck

scenarios.description: Levitate grants immunity to Ground-type moves
scenarios.note: Levitate: Ground moves deal 0 damage. Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c Levitate

scenarios.description: Thick Fat halves damage from Fire and Ice type moves
scenarios.note: Thick Fat: 0.5x modifier on Fire and Ice moves. Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c ThickFat

scenarios.description: Multi-hit moves hit 2-5 times with distribution 37.5%/37.5%/12.5%/12.5%
scenarios.note: Gen 3 multi-hit: 2 hits = 37.5%, 3 = 37.5%, 4 = 12.5%, 5 = 12.5%. Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c MultiHitLoop

scenarios.description: Consecutive Protect/Detect uses: success rate drops to 1/2, 1/4, 1/8, then caps at 1/8
scenarios.note: Each consecutive use: 50% → 25% → 12.5% → caps. Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c ProtectCheck

scenarios.description: Struggle deals 25% of attacker's max HP as recoil in Gen 3 (changed from Gen 1-2)
scenarios.note: Gen 3: Recoil = floor(max_hp / 4). Gen 1-2 was floor(damage / 2). Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c StruggleRecoil

scenarios.description: Swift Swim doubles Speed in rain, increasing damage output via doubled speed in turn order
scenarios.note: Swift Swim: 2x Speed in rain. Affects turn order but not damage directly. Source: pret/pokeemerald src/battle_script_commands.c SwiftSwim

scenarios.description: Iron Fist boosts punching moves by 20% — not in Gen 3 (introduced Gen 4)
scenarios.note: Iron Fist was introduced in Gen 4 (Hitmonchan). Gen 3 does not have this ability. Listed here to document that boosting abilities are gen-specific. Source: pret/pokeemerald abilities.c — Iron Fist not present
